languages.text: {n}Префект осекается от резкого звука, эхом отразившегося от стен залы. За толстыми стеклами окуляров глаза префекта сверкают недовольством, однако она быстро выпаливает:{/n} "По решению Вольного Торговца и с учетом ситации процессия ограничится кратким протоколом".

{n}The prefect stops at the unceremonious sound reverberating throughout the room. Behind her thick ocular lenses, her eyes flash with displeasure, but she quickly says,{/n} "It is the Rogue Trader's prerogative to sanction an abridged version of the proceedings whenever appropriate..."
languages.original_text: {n}Префект осекается от резкого звука, эхом отразившегося от стен залы. За толстыми стеклами окуляров глаза префекта сверкают недовольством, однако она быстро выпаливает:{/n} "По решению Вольного Торговца и с учетом ситации процессия ограничится кратким протоколом".

languages.text: {n}La préfète s'interrompt alors que le son guttural bien peu protocolaire résonne à travers la pièce. Derrière les épaisses lentilles, un éclat de colère illumine son regard, mais elle se reprend rapidement :{/n} « Libre à vous de préférer une version abrégée du cérémonial en vigueur quand cela s'avère approprié... »
languages.original_text: {n}The prefect stops at the unceremonious sound reverberating throughout the room. Behind her thick ocular lenses, her eyes flash with displeasure, but she quickly says,{/n} "It is the Rogue Trader's prerogative to sanction an abridged version of the proceedings whenever appropriate..."

traits.locale_text: {n}La préfète s'interrompt alors que le son guttural bien peu protocolaire résonne à travers la pièce. Derrière les épaisses lentilles, un éclat de colère illumine son regard, mais elle se reprend rapidement :{/n} « Libre à vous de préférer une version abrégée du cérémonial en vigueur quand cela s'avère approprié... »

languages.text: {n}La prefecta se detiene ante el sonido inapropiado que reverbera por la sala. Tras sus gruesas lentes oculares, sus ojos revelan su desagrado, pero se repone rápidamente y dice:{/n} «{mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente tiene derecho a aprobar una versión abreviada del procedimiento cuando lo considere apropiado...».
languages.original_text: {n}The prefect stops at the unceremonious sound reverberating throughout the room. Behind her thick ocular lenses, her eyes flash with displeasure, but she quickly says,{/n} "It is the Rogue Trader's prerogative to sanction an abridged version of the proceedings whenever appropriate..."

traits.locale_text: {n}La prefecta se detiene ante el sonido inapropiado que reverbera por la sala. Tras sus gruesas lentes oculares, sus ojos revelan su desagrado, pero se repone rápidamente y dice:{/n} «{mf|El|La} Comerciante Independiente tiene derecho a aprobar una versión abreviada del procedimiento cuando lo considere apropiado...».

languages.text: {n}你唐突的咳嗽声在整个房间中回荡。行政官住了口，宛如啤酒瓶底的镜片后面传来了她充满愠怒的目光，但她很快又开了口。{/n}“行商浪人确实有权在任意时刻要求精简仪式……”
languages.original_text: {n}The prefect stops at the unceremonious sound reverberating throughout the room. Behind her thick ocular lenses, her eyes flash with displeasure, but she quickly says,{/n} "It is the Rogue Trader's prerogative to sanction an abridged version of the proceedings whenever appropriate..."

languages.text: {n}Die Präfektin hält angesichts des ungebührlichen Geräuschs inne, das durch den Raum hallt. Hinter ihren dicken Okularlinsen funkeln ihre Augen verärgert, ehe sie rasch erklärt: {/n}"Es ist das Privileg {mf|des Freihändlers|der Freihändlerin}, eine verkürzte Version des Prozederes zu billigen, sofern dies angemessen ist ...
languages.original_text: {n}The prefect stops at the unceremonious sound reverberating throughout the room. Behind her thick ocular lenses, her eyes flash with displeasure, but she quickly says,{/n} "It is the Rogue Trader's prerogative to sanction an abridged version of the proceedings whenever appropriate..."

languages.text: {n}総監は部屋全体に響く無作法な音で中断する。分厚いレンズの向こうで、彼女の目が不機嫌に瞬き、すぐに言う。{/n}「儀式の短縮形式を認めるのはローグトレーダーの特権です…」
languages.original_text: {n}The prefect stops at the unceremonious sound reverberating throughout the room. Behind her thick ocular lenses, her eyes flash with displeasure, but she quickly says,{/n} "It is the Rogue Trader's prerogative to sanction an abridged version of the proceedings whenever appropriate..."

traits.locale_text: {n}総監は部屋全体に響く無作法な音で中断する。分厚いレンズの向こうで、彼女の目が不機嫌に瞬き、すぐに言う。{/n}「儀式の短縮形式を認めるのはローグトレーダーの特権です…」

languages.text: {n}Prefekt, odada yankılanan bu hırıltıyı duyunca duruyor. Kalın oküler merceklerinin ardındaki gözleri hoşnutsuzlukla parlıyor, tekrar konuşmaya başlıyor.{/n} "Mümkün olduğunda gidişatın kısaltılmış bir hâlini duyma hakkı, Hür Tacir'in ayrıcalıklarındandır..."
languages.original_text: {n}The prefect stops at the unceremonious sound reverberating throughout the room. Behind her thick ocular lenses, her eyes flash with displeasure, but she quickly says,{/n} "It is the Rogue Trader's prerogative to sanction an abridged version of the proceedings whenever appropriate..."
